meta.title: About SGS | International Clean Energy Advisory
meta.description: About SGS: an international renewable energy consulting, project development, and sustainable infrastructure advisory firm.

hero.title: International advisory for energy, water, and sustainable infrastructure.
hero.text: Founded in 2015, SGS was built to respond to growing water and energy demand in the MENA region with practical, modern, and partnership-driven solutions.

intro.title: A consulting platform with technical depth.
intro.text: SGS combines strategic advisory, project development, and technology coordination. We work with clients who need more than supply. They need a partner who can structure the opportunity, align the right stakeholders, and support execution.

pillars.title: Help clients move clean infrastructure from concept to action.
Advance renewable energy and sustainable utility systems across growth markets.
Open collaboration, trust, and fit-for-purpose project partnerships.

market_focus.title: Built for GCC and MENA. Connected internationally.
market_focus.text: SGS supports regional project delivery while working with international suppliers, research channels, and specialist vendors. That mix helps clients access stronger technologies and clearer delivery options.

cards.title: Renewable energy leads
cards.text: Solar and clean infrastructure sit at the center of the offer.

cards.title: Advisory mindset
cards.text: We structure projects, partnerships, and delivery pathways.

cards.title: Technical credibility
cards.text: Water, desalination, wastewater, and EPC coordination remain core strengths.

cards.title: Long-term thinking
cards.text: We support execution, operations, and practical project continuity.

cta.title: Engage a partner built for renewable infrastructure decisions.
